blended.narrative: Pico Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Sunday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
